T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: http://www.wpc-edi.com/reference/codelists/healthcare/claim-adjustment-reason-codes/ 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Values will include leading zeros. 

Values and websites referenced may change over time.
